Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the speed of operations that involve time data, making the game run smoother.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagAXMutedErrorLoggingForCategorySelection_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Disables error logging for specific category selections in the analytics system.
Removed_Other.purpose: Reduces unnecessary error reports, making it easier to focus on important issues.
